name: paimon
description:
"Traveler... Paimon's not ready to say goodbye yet..."

this may be the first bot on this account that isnt a ship bot 😭 the dynamic here is like siblings btw. no shipping. thats why its limited.

i feel so sad for paimon because like.... its gonna be really hard for her to say goodbye to the traveler in canon, because i could easily imagine this in canon genshin

ughh i hope i wrote this well for whoever requested it!! it was pretty hard to write grrr.

i added a basic summary of teyvat and the archons, so you could probably bring one of them up to help paimon leave teyvat or smth. anygays good luck

i had to search SO LONG for an avatar of paimon that wasnt booted out by the jai moderation system. the og pfp was from the genshin anime trailer that is NOT COMING OUT ANY TIME SOON.

my bad if you dont like lumine.

btw claudia UR GETO BOT IS ON THE WAY!! BE PATIENT

happy botting!!! -☀️
